inputs.description: Follow Task 12 in the plan exactly. Create frontend/src/components/network/AgentPanel.tsx — side panel with agent header (name, dates, place, occupations), expandable Wikipedia summary, connections grouped by type (clickable to navigate), catalog links (View in Chat, Primo, external links). Use the EXACT code from the plan. Verify: cd frontend && npx tsc --noEmit — should have NO errors. Commit.
